description_long: This maintenance worker is depicted as a human figure dressed in a light gray, full-body uniform with matching pants and a jacket. The uniform features several patches and insignia, including a rectangular badge on the left chest and a circular logo on the right chest, as well as a patch on the upper left arm. The worker wears a futuristic, full-face helmet with a visor and integrated communication device, and a scarf or mask covers the lower face and neck. The shoes are dark gray with white accents, and the gloves are not visibly distinct from the sleeves. The overall appearance suggests a professional engaged in technical or maintenance work, possibly in a high-tech or urban environment.
description: A maintenance worker in a light gray uniform with patches, a full-face helmet, and a face covering, standing upright and ready for technical tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the uniform's chest patches, helmet visor, and face covering.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the helmet's profile, arm patch, and uniform's side seam.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel details of the uniform and helmet's rear design.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the helmet's side, arm patch, and the uniform's fit along the body.
attribute_uniform_type: light gray technical jumpsuit with patches and insignia, paired with a full-face helmet and face covering
attribute_work_badge_or_insignia: Rectangular badge with text and logo on the left chest, circular logo on the right chest, and a patch on the upper left arm
